# grafana_assistant_quickstart (Resource)

Manages a Grafana Assistant quickstart prompt shown to users.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "grafana_assistant_quickstart" "example" {
  scope  = "tenant"
  title  = "SLO health"
  prompt = "How healthy are my SLOs right now?"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `prompt` (String) The quickstart question text.
- `scope` (String) Whether the resource is visible to the whole tenant (`tenant`) or only the creating user (`user`).

### Optional

- `context_items` (String) Optional JSON array of context items for the quickstart.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the resource is enabled.
- `title` (String) Optional title for the quickstart.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The UUID of the resource.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

```shell
terraform import grafana_assistant_quickstart.name "{{ id }}"
```
